---
title: "Team"
subtitle: "Team grid layout component for Quarto"
description: "A quarto shortcode extension to add team layouts for html and revealjs formats"
format: html
---

## Install

- Requires Quarto >= 1.4.0
- In the root of the quarto project, run in terminal:

  ```
  quarto add royfrancis/quarto-team
  ```

This will install the extension under the `_extensions` subdirectory. See 'usage' document for details on how to use the shortcode.
